issues.sample: CAR RATTLES AND SHAKES SIGNIFICANTLY (ESPECIALLY THE REAR WHEELS) DURING ACCELERATION. TOOK THE CAR TO DEALER INFORMED ME THAT IT IS THE 'TRANSFER BOX' THAT HAS FAILED AND IT IS A KNOWN PROBLEM WITH THIS CAR. THE ISSUE IS SO COMMON THAT PORSCHE DOES NOT HAVE PARTS AVAILABLE AND T

Porsche dashboard leather shrunk, shifted position, and staples pulled out.  Repair technician said if vehicle was in an accident the airbag might not deploy correctly.  Porsche dealer has stated if the dashboard leather material gets in this state, they recommend replacing it.

SAME DAY I BOTH CAR WHEN I REACHED HOME... THE RIGHT SIDE TURN SIGNAL LIGHT FELL OFF AND WAS HANGING FROM THE WIRE.  I HAD TO GO BACK TO THE DEALERSHIP TWICE TO FIX THIS PROBLEM BECAUSE THEY DIDN'T HAVE ANYTHING IN STOCK.  AFTER 200 MILES ON MY CAR I STARTED TO HEAR A KNOCKING SO

narrative.headline: What 2014 Porsche Cayenne owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 53 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (32% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
